title: CSV exporter + identifier columns + validation
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. A flat CSV projection lets non-technical consumers ingest the crosswalk while preserving stable identifiers.
objective: Build the CSV exporter with identifier columns and validation, mirroring the golden-fixture pattern of case-011.
acceptanceCriteria: Emits CSV with identifier columns (caseGuid, asnUri, frameworkId, statementId, OER id/url) plus alignment type/strength/coverage and review status.
Validation checks required columns and identifier format; ships golden record -> expected-CSV fixtures diffed in CI.
Reference-by-identifier respected; a statementText column is populated only where reproduction is permitted.
Code MIT; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; the commit is DCO signed-off; no credentials or secrets committed.
